contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Created FSVP compliance roadmap & unit economics template for Indonesia cacao partner onboarding
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/581
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/commit/0a3eca8252365a82deb1089e1ce246bab9c42f88
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/commit/d467993eea7eff2371b424384626d6a21c6ccf5c
  
  Details:
  Created two reference PDFs for onboarding Jessey / Conservana Spices as an Indonesia cacao supplier:
  
  1. **Unit Economics Template** — Blank cost-structure framework for Indonesia cacao (no prices, just slot labels). Jessey fills in their own numbers.
     - Commit: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/commit/0a3eca8252365a82deb1089e1ce246bab9c42f88
  
  2. **FDA FSVP Compliance & First Shipment Roadmap** — Comprehensive 8-page document covering:
     - All 25 documents needed from the Indonesia entity (entity registration, HACCP plan, facility info, supplier evaluation, product specs)
     - Freight & logistics section with 5 recommended Indonesia→USA freight forwarders, route options, and blank cost factors
     - 5-phase end-to-end execution roadmap with checkpoints
     - Estimated 10-18 week timeline from start to first shipment landing
     - Commit: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/commit/d467993eea7eff2371b424384626d6a21c6ccf5c
  
  3. **Editable markdown version** of the unit economics template (PR #581) for easy copy-paste into Google Docs.
     - PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/581
  
  These documents facilitate the discussion with Jessey on unit economics, FDA compliance requirements, and logistics planning for Indonesia→USA cacao distribution.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia Truesight
